# Full Metric Matrix

Metrics are reconstructed from saved public reproduction rows using test04 positive/negative counts, attack recall and FPR. This gives attack-positive, normal-positive, macro, weighted and accuracy-like views from the same predictions.

Top corrected attack-positive rows:

